rows.notes: P72 runs only after P71 lands the clean-descendant readiness sidecar.
P72 preserves the standing green preflight and archive-ready posture.
P72 should run from the current archive-polish and explicit-stop handoff branch.
README and STATUS should expose P72 as the current archive-polish explicit-stop handoff wave.
Docs routers and planning indexes should expose the P72 handoff stack and prompts.
Publication router and branch registry should expose P72 while preserving clean-descendant-only posture.
Release-facing and submission-facing docs should treat P72 as a hygiene-only handoff sidecar.
Archive ledgers and boundary summaries should expose P72 without widening the evidence bundle.
The live driver and next plan-mode surfaces should freeze explicit-stop handoff facts without reopening scope.
